changelog: Version 1.0.1 - Major bug fixes, UI improvements, new Apex features, and optimization enhancements.

changes: Fixed restore point error when attempting to create a restore point.
Fixed restore point error occurring after applying tweaks.
Fixed buttons displaying 'Upgrade to Premium' instead of 'Upgrade to Apex'.
Fixed Startup Boost progress not being counted correctly on the dashboard (0/4 Free, 0/21 Apex).
Fixed Server Booster save state not being preserved.
Fixed Apex and Extreme Profiles failing to apply.
Fixed Apex MSI Utility Tuner visual issues.
Fixed Apex Auto Affinity Tuner completion popup.
Improved the UI for Apex Auto Affinity Tuner.
Improved the UI for Apex MSI Utility Tuner.
Added Apex Boot Optimization system.
Added Apex Mode to Startup Boost.
Removed the Scheduled Debloat feature.
Fixed Startup Boost behavior and optimization process.
Fixed CPU Tuner not starting automatically on Windows startup.
Fixed remaining buttons displaying 'Upgrade to Premium' or 'Upgrade to Pro' instead of 'Upgrade to Apex'.
Added warning dialogs for tweaks that require extra caution.
Added warning icons and descriptions for applicable tweaks.
Added error codes to assist with debugging.
Added more revert tweak options.
Added a Revert Tweaks UI dialog.
Moved BIOS tweak application to the UI thread to prevent freezing.
Added a warning that Shader Cache will rebuild after deletion.
Added Roblox Error 268 fix.
Initial Release
Added new BIOS tweaks
Added CPU Tuner
Added Priorities Manager
Added Game Booster tweaks
Added Startup tweaks
Added Debloat Manager
Added system cleaning utilities
Added advanced CPU and Windows optimizations
